activities.message: Sunday morning standup - 'Weekend Premiere' launch day. Junction sprint Day 6. ALTERNATE armed with 36+ checks ready. 3 blockers: YouTube status, extras handles, git push. Tom recovering from rough night - be efficient.

Valentine's Day morning standup. 2 CRITICAL blockers: ALTERNATE release date STILL unclear (Feb 14 or 15?), Seedance 2 blocked 4+ days. DBH filming complete yesterday - content ready to process. Junction sprint Day 5.

Morning standup complete. 2 human blockers identified: DBH filming date confusion (today vs tomorrow?), Seedance 2 access blocked 3+ days. Domain junctionmedia.ai verified live. Team operational except ALTERNATE (paused).
Real DBH case study drafted - replaces fake testimonial content on Junction website. No fabricated stats, real work documented.
Email welcome sequence outlined - 5-email nurture sequence over 10 days, ready for platform setup
3 LinkedIn posts drafted - 'Why we built AI agency', 'Speed advantage', 'Case study teaser' - ready for Tom's review
Content Calendar (Weeks 1-2) created - full publishing schedule with daily tasks, checklist, metrics
Lessons Learned System complete - scripts/lessons-learned.cjs: log insights, synthesize patterns, compound knowledge across agents
Website updated: removed cursor dot, fixed marquee, updated copy
Team discussion: Junction business model, human-in-loop structure, budget planning
Full service details added to website - all 10 services, AI advantage, human-in-loop
Client #001 Onboarding Brief complete - Junction is our first client
SEO Keyword Strategy complete - MASSIVE opportunity, no competition for AI agency NZ
Tom: 'Let's fucking go. Not 90 days - 2 weeks. Build build build.'
Service Operations Blueprint complete (36KB) - all 11 services documented
Client Playbook Template created - onboarding, ops, escalation, handoffs
Tom briefed team on vision: thousands of AI employees, build autonomously, create history
First agent team discussion - coordination protocols, knowledge compounding, autonomous loops
Persistent agent sessions created - JARVIS, SHURI, FURY, Junction Content now live
Tom's founding message logged to MEMORY.md - building toward thousands of AI employees
Junction website v3 deployed with premium animations
Seedance 2 access message drafted for China contact
Video gen research complete - Vidu AI (~10 sec), Pika, Runway alternatives found
